zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Mortimer於1352年2月1日出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March23歲，母親Philippa Montagu19歲。她於1371年與Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年11月3日之前在英國英格蘭德比夏爾安巴斯頓，埋葬在英國德比夏爾安巴斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Mortimer于1352年2月1日出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March23岁，母亲Philippa Montagu19岁。她于1371年与Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley在英国英格兰史洛普爾盧德洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年11月3日之前在英国英格兰德比夏爾安巴斯頓，埋葬在英国德比夏爾安巴斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Mortimer was born on 1 February 1352, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, her father, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, was 23 and her mother, Philippa Montagu, was 19. She married Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley in 1371, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 3 November 1405, in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Mortimer est née le 1 février 1352, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Philippa Montagu, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley en 1371, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 3 novembre 1405, à Ambaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Ambaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Mortimer am 1. Februar 1352 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March 23 und ihre Mutter Philippa Montagu 19. Sie hat 1371 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 3. November 1405 in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ambaston, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Mortimer è nata il il 1 febbraio 1352 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Philippa Montagu, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley nel 1371, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 3 novembre 1405, nel Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Ambaston, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Mortimerが1352年2月1日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of Marchは23歳，母Philippa Montaguは19歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウでSir John Touchet Baron of Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年11月3日以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアンバストンで死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアンバストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Mortimer(이)가 1352년 2월 1일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Montagu(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 11월 3일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 아바스턴에서 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 아바스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.1 February 1352–before 3 November 1405: 1 de fevereiro de 1352–antes 3 de novembro de 1405
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Mortimer nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1352, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Montagu, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley em 1371, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 3 de novembro de 1405, em Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Mortimer родилась 1 февраля 1352 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Montagu, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley в 1371 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 3 ноябрь 1405 г. в местности эмбастон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эмбастон, дирбишир, Англия.

es.1 February 1352–before 3 November 1405: 1 de febrero de 1352–antes de 3 de noviembre de 1405
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Mortimer nació el 1 de febrero de 1352, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Philippa Montagu, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley en 1371, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 3 de noviembre de 1405, en Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Ambaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
